message:
fix(hooks): correct UTF-8 truncation in message environment variable

The previous fix could exceed 1000 bytes if a rune started past the
target length. Use prevI pattern to ensure truncation always respects
the byte limit while staying on rune boundaries.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
